title: Farewell Dinner For Retiring Members of NGX Group Board of Directors - FinancialEDGE
description: Farewell Dinner For Retiring Members of NGX Group Board of Directors Photo Caption: L–R: Mr. Oscar N. Onyema, OON, former Group Managing Director, Nigerian Exchange Group (NGX Group); Mr. Emmanuel Ikhazoboh, former Interim Administrator, The Nigerian Stock Exchange (NSE); Mr. Abayomi Oluyomi, Honourable Commissioner for Finance, Lagos State, representing the Governor of Lagos State,
html:
Farewell Dinner For Retiring Members of NGX Group Board of Directors

 

Photo Caption: L–R: Mr. Oscar N. Onyema, OON, former Group Managing Director, Nigerian Exchange Group (NGX Group); Mr. Emmanuel Ikhazoboh, former Interim Administrator, The Nigerian Stock Exchange (NSE); Mr. Abayomi Oluyomi, Honourable Commissioner for Finance, Lagos State, representing the Governor of Lagos State, Mr. Babajide Sanwo-Olu; Mr. Temi Popoola, Group Managing Director/CEO, NGX Group; His Imperial Majesty, Oba Adeyeye Enitan Ogunwusi, CFR, the Ọọni of Ife (Ọjájá II); Alhaji (Dr.) Umaru Kwairanga, Group Chairman, NGX Group; Prof. Ndi Okereke-Onyiuke, OON, former Director General, NSE; Mr. Aigboje Aig-Imoukhuede, CFR, former President, NSE and Chairman, Coronation Group; and Mr. Emomotimi Agama, Director General, Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), at the Farewell Dinner for retiring members of the NGX Group Board of Directors, held at Harbor Point, Victoria Island, Lagos, on Wednesday, April 9, 2025.
